creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text: While there, "The official release build machines have a specific filesystem layout, which using ZFS, thermite.sh takes heavy advantage of with clones and snapshots, ensuring a pristine build environment." (section 7.2) should be split into 2 sentences for easier parsing. Suggested: "The official release build machines have a specific filesystem layout using ZFS. The thermite.sh wrapper takes heavy advantage of that with clones and snapshots, ensuring a pristine build environment."
